Minimum Requirement: Current registry extract and exact manufacturing-site address
Batch-specific numerical results, methods, specifications and quality approval
Accept: Complete and verified against representative testing
Deficient: Pass/fail only or missing method context
Reject / Quarantine: Altered, copied, impossible or unverifiable data

Minimum Requirement: Class-appropriate orthogonal methods and reference standard
Validated purity plus independent content/potency result
Accept: Numerical data, chromatograms and specifications present

Deficient: Batch sterility test without process evidence
Reject / Quarantine: Failed, invalid or unsupported sterile claim

Minimum Requirement: Batch-specific method, limit and numerical result
Accept: Limit scientifically justified and result within specification
Reject / Quarantine: Failed or missing for a sterile/parenteral-risk claim

Minimum Requirement: Protocol, conditions, methods, batches and timepoints
Reject / Quarantine: Expired evidence or stability failure concealed

Minimum Requirement: Exact product and side-by-side identity/formulation evidence
Reject / Quarantine: Approval or trial evidence transferred without comparability
